title: 憧れる気持ちと、震える心と

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You see, I plan to have a race with Teio soon...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I may, I would ask you to attend and witness the outcome. And,
provided you are willing, to continue to look out for her afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Rudolf organizes a race with Teio just a few days
later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the talk of the town, with spectators crowding the racecourse
hours before—no surprise, given the popularity of both contenders.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, now that's a crowd. Feels like we're in the Twinkle Series! Ahaha! Now I'm all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hey, look who's here!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Tsk tsk. I am the invincible Teio, remember? So obviously, I'm in peak condition! I'll crush this race, and the crowd will go wild!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh but... Ah... Never mind, forgot I'm up against Prez today...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Up against Prez, huh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um... Nope!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I just, uh... I gotta go get ready! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, the gates fling open as the crowd roars on.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... All right, time to show her what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the race nears the halfway mark, Teio dashes ahead in an attempt
to pass Rudolf, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You are not overtaking me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh c'mon, now I'm even farther behind!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Nnngh, the last straightaway! No, I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I said, you are not overtaking me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf maintained her dominant lead from start to finish, leaving Teio
to pass the winning post in a distant second.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Guess I lose...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But, well, Prez is just that incredi—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Yeahhhh! "

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: President Rudolf, that was incredible! You never disappoint!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Teio's super fast too, but you beat her with such a huge lead! No
wonder they call you the strongest ever!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Prez! Prez! Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My friends, I thank you for your support.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Th-that's a lot of cheers... All eyes are on her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And only her...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I-it's nothing. It's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Teio turns her back on the frenzied crowd and darts off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I next see her late that night, at the same park by the school.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...
choice_data_list: Little late for a jog, don't you think?
Little late for a jog, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you... Mm, I'm not really in the mood to chat.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Laters.
...Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run over in a hurry. Close up, I can see her legs trembling—she's
been pushing herself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! This is nothing, trust me. I gotta get back to running, so leave
me alone!
choice_data_list: You can't keep pushing yourself like this!
You can't keep pushing yourself like this!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What's it to you, anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Get out of my way! You're not even my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Wh-what's with you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... What? ...Why do you even care?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stay by her side as she cries for a while, offering what little comfort I
can.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah... But... I still don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: There's been this... stinging in my chest, ever since the race.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It started when I saw Prez getting all those cheers from the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It makes no sense, I know. I mean, she's my role model.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The strongest, the fastest, the most incredible person. The most
deserving of praise from the entire world.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: She's everything I could ever dream to be.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Every one of her races that I've gone to, she's won. And seeing her
bask in the crowd's cheers with that smile she does is the coolest
thing ever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But still, for some reason...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like, today was no different. I saw her be that perfect person I've
always seen her be.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So... why do I feel like I have to run to get away from this feeling?
Why does it hurt so much?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Teio seems to be on the verge of an important realization.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But all I can do for now is see her back to her dorm, and wait.
